title: Currency & Cards
description: Euros, exchange, banking and international cards for travel in Belgium.

items.title: Currency Exchange
items.description: Belgium uses the Euro (EUR). Exchange bureaus are available at the airport and city centres, though rates are often better via ATM withdrawal.
tips: Avoid airport exchange counters for large amounts — rates are usually worse than ATMs or banks

items.title: ATMs & Cards
items.description: Contactless debit/credit cards (Visa, Mastercard) are widely accepted across Belgium, including on public transport.
tips: Notify your Indian bank before travel to avoid card blocks
Carry a small amount of cash for smaller shops or markets

items.title: International Cards
items.description: Forex/travel cards can help avoid repeated foreign transaction fees.
tips: Compare foreign transaction fees between your Indian bank and a dedicated forex card before travel

items.title: Banking
items.description: See the Working in Belgium section for guidance on opening a Belgian bank account as a resident.
